name: Apple Cake in a Jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease 8 wide mouth pint jars.
2. Mix all ingredients in each jar until well combined.
3. Place the jars on a wire rack and bake at 325°F for 45 minutes.
4. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
5. Turn off the heat source.
6. Carefully remove the lid of one jar, placing it upside down to cool completely.
7. Secure the lid with the band after wiping any residue from the rim.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 for all jars.
9. Do not add any other ingredients.
10. Suitable for Christmas gifts.
